name: @canopy/item-types
description: Cross-app item-type taxonomy + JSON Schema validation. Ships the canonical types (task, note, chat-message, offer, request, claim, contact, calendar-event, announcement, reveal-request, neighbourhood-job) plus the standard `embeds: [{type, ref}, ...]` field. Project-namespaced under `https://canopy.org/ns#`; no schema.org dependency. Vocabulary refresh 2026-05-12 — legacy names (supply-offer / demand-offer / lend-request) persist as aliases.
